parameter_a.notes: Legal entity: PT Andalusia Antar Benua. Contact: info@andapay.id, +62 816 882298. Website built on Framer. No physical address displayed.

parameter_b.notes: Claims BI PJP3 license since June 6, 2011 with number 13/83/DASP/33 for money transfer services (Penyelenggara Pengiriman Uang). License NOT YET VERIFIED in BI registry. Services: Local Transfer (BI Fast, Interbank, E-wallet), International Transfer (remittance), Business solutions (disbursement).
parameter_b.bi_verification_notes: BI Registry checked on 2026-02-18. License format 13/83/DASP/33 is OLD format from pre-2016 era (before PBI 18/40/PBI/2016). Current BI registry shows new format licenses (e.g., 28/2/KEP.GBI/Btm/2026). Old-format licenses should have been converted to new PJP categories after 2016. License NOT FOUND in current BI registry search. POSSIBLE SCENARIOS: (1) License revoked/expired, (2) Converted but under different company name, (3) License not renewed. MANUAL VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Check 'Izin Dicabut' status filter or contact BI directly.

parameter_c.notes: Services clearly described: Local Transfer (Interbank, BI Fast, E-wallet), International Transfer, Business disbursement solutions. Dashboard and API integration available.

parameter_d.notes: Claims 'pay per successful transaction, no hidden fees' and 'money back guarantee if transaction fails'. No specific fee amounts disclosed. No pricing page.

parameter_e.notes: No T&C page found. No privacy policy visible. Website is a simple landing page built on Framer.

parameter_f.notes: Email: info@andapay.id. Phone: +62 816 882298. Claims 24/7 customer support. No FAQ, no chat support.

parameter_g.notes: No privacy policy found. PDP compliance not verifiable.

parameter_h.notes: Website built on Framer (framer.website). HTTPS enabled. No customer portal/login on landing page.

parameter_i.notes: No Play Store/App Store app. Limited online presence. Claims BI license since 2011 (long-established company). No social media links found.

general_notes: Andapay is a money transfer/remittance service operated by PT Andalusia Antar Benua. Claims BI PJP3 license since 2011 (13/83/DASP/33). NOT a PJP/Aggregator - they process their own transfer services, not payments for other merchants. CLASSIFIED AS REGULAR MERCHANT with regulated activity (BI license required but claimed). License needs verification in BI registry.
